hero.subtitle: Brussels-based digital studio for SMEs and startups. From idea to launch in 6 weeks — design, development, and AI under one roof.

ai.desc: We identify where AI creates real value in your business and build it.

web.title: Product

design.title: Design
design.desc: User experiences that look great and drive measurable business results.

subsidy.headline: Belgian SME? Your project may be partially subsidised.
subsidy.desc: Depending on your region: Innoviris (Brussels), Chèques-entreprises (Wallonia) or VLAIO (Flanders) can cover part of the cost. We handle the application.

about.title: Why companies trust Codelli
about.lead: Cem Tekelli founded Codelli with one conviction: SMEs deserve the same level of digital quality as large corporations. Full-stack studio based in Brussels — design, development, and AI under one roof.

roof.title: Everything under one roof
roof.desc: Design + Development + AI. One team, no subcontracting, no communication gaps.

ai.title: AI-powered delivery
ai.desc: We use AI in our own development process — delivering 2-3x faster than traditional agencies.

price.title: Fixed price, no surprises
price.desc: We commit to a scope, a price, and a deadline before we start. No surprises along the way.

local.title: Brussels-based, multilingual
local.desc: Local team. We speak French, English, Dutch. We understand GDPR, Belgian subsidies, and EU regulations.

1.text: Codelli completely transformed our online presence. Within weeks, we had a site that truly reflects Baba Events' identity and generates real leads. The result exceeded our expectations.
1.name: Rifat Balaj

2.text: Cem understands what entrepreneurs need. He didn't just deliver an app — he delivered a solution that saves my team time every single day. Professional, responsive, and genuinely invested in the project.
2.name: Obaida Isarti

3.text: We were looking for a reliable technical partner to digitise part of our operations at Nautilus. Codelli delivered on time, on budget, and the product works exactly as planned. I recommend them without hesitation.
3.name: Fuat Yuksel

1.title: Baba Events
1.desc: Full-featured ticketing platform with a custom backoffice — event management, integrated QR scanner, online payments via Mollie, and real-time reporting. Built for a Brussels-based event organiser.

2.title: Noctix
2.desc: A sovereign alternative to Eventbrite for independent organisers — ticketing, capacity management, integrated Mollie payments and detailed analytics, with zero commission on sales.

3.title: Lead Gen — Google Maps
3.desc: Fully automated B2B lead generation pipeline — business data extraction via the Google Maps Places API, driven by configurable zip codes and business categories stored in Google Sheets. Results enriched in real time: name, phone, website, GPS coordinates, rating and customer reviews.

launch.name: Launch & Grow

meta.title: Free Discovery Call — Let's Start Your Project | Codelli
meta.description: Book a free 30-minute call with Codelli. We define your project together — design, development or AI integration. Digital studio in Brussels.

info.step1Title: A clear analysis of your situation
info.step1Desc: We understand your business, constraints and objectives — no generic questions.
info.step2Desc: Design, development, AI — we identify what has the most impact for your business.
info.step3Desc: Scope, estimated budget, next steps — sent by email within 24h.
info.forWhom1: SMEs and startups with 5 to 100 employees in Belgium, France or Luxembourg.
info.forWhom2: Founders who want a website, an app or an AI integration — and don't know where to start.
info.forWhom3: Companies looking for concrete answers, not PowerPoint presentations.

brussels.title: Innoviris — Start AI Voucher
brussels.desc: Up to €10,000, covering 75% of AI study costs for Brussels SMEs. Led by an approved expertise centre.

wallonia.title: Chèques-entreprises — Digital Maturity
wallonia.desc: Up to €50,000 excl. VAT over 3 years, with a 50% intervention rate. Electronic portfolio of €200,000 over 3 years (max. €100,000/year).

flanders.title: VLAIO — SME Portfolio
flanders.desc: 20 to 30% discount on digitisation training. Since February 2026, digital consulting is no longer subsidised (except cybersecurity: 35–45%). Digital investment deduction available.

info.subsidyNote: Programmes change regularly. Amounts and conditions are those in effect at the time of publication. We help you verify your eligibility during the call.

meta.title: Privacy Policy & Legal Notice | Codelli
meta.description: Privacy policy, legal notice and cookie policy of Codelli — AI digital studio in Brussels, Belgium. BCE 1006.208.714.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.desc: The website codelli.tech is published by Codelli Engineering. All content on this site (texts, images, logos, graphics) is protected by copyright and remains the exclusive property of Codelli Engineering, unless otherwise stated.

gdpr.title: Privacy Policy (GDPR)
gdpr.intro: Codelli Engineering, as data controller, is committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR — EU 2016/679) and applicable Belgian legislation.
gdpr.dataIntro: When you use the site or get in touch, we may collect the following data:

dataItems.5: Browsing data (via cookies — see Cookies section)

purposes.1: Responding to your contact requests — legal basis: performance of a contract or pre-contractual measures
purposes.2: Organising discovery calls (via Calendly) — legal basis: consent
purposes.3: Analysing traffic and improving the site (via Google Analytics via GTM) — legal basis: consent

gdpr.retention: Contact data is retained for 3 years from the last exchange. Navigation data is retained for 13 months in accordance with CNIL/DPA recommendations.
gdpr.recipientsIntro: Your data is not sold to third parties. It may be shared with:

recipients.1: Calendly Inc. — for appointment scheduling (policy available at calendly.com)
recipients.2: Google LLC — for audience analysis (Google Analytics via GTM)

gdpr.recipientsNote: These processors are subject to appropriate contractual safeguards (Standard Contractual Clauses or Privacy Shield successor) for any transfer outside the EU.
gdpr.rightsIntro: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the following rights:

rights.1: Right of access — obtain a copy of your data
rights.3: Right to erasure — request the deletion of your data
rights.4: Right to object — object to processing for legitimate reasons
rights.5: Right to data portability — receive your data in a structured format
rights.6: Right to restriction — restrict the processing of your data

gdpr.rightsContact: To exercise these rights, contact us at: hello@codelli.tech. We respond within 30 days. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Data Protection Authority (DPA).

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.intro: This site uses cookies. A cookie is a small text file placed on your device when you visit. You can accept or refuse them via the consent banner displayed on your first visit.
cookiePolicy.prefsIntro: You can change your preferences at any time by deleting cookies from your browser or using your browser's privacy settings:
cookiePolicy.gaOptout: You can also opt out of Google Analytics tracking via the official opt-out module.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.p1: Codelli Engineering strives to maintain accurate and up-to-date information on this site. However, we do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness or currency of the information published. Codelli Engineering cannot be held responsible for direct or indirect damages resulting from the use of this site.
liability.p2: Hyperlinks to third-party sites do not imply any responsibility on the part of Codelli Engineering for their content.
